name: Impossible Vegetable Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the cauliflower or chop the broccoli. A 10 oz. package of frozen broccoli or cauliflower can be used instead of fresh, thawed and drained, but do not cook first.
2. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
3. Lightly grease a 9-inch pie plate.
4. Bring a pot of salted water (1/2 teaspoon salt to 1 cup water) to boiling.
5. Add broccoli to the boiling water, cover and heat until tender, about 5 minutes.
6. Drain thoroughly.
7. Mix broccoli, onion, green pepper, and cheese in the pie plate.
8. Beat remaining ingredients smooth for about 15 seconds in a blender on high speed.
9. Pour the mixture into the pie plate.
10. Bake at 400°F (200°C) until golden brown and a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean, approximately 35-40 minutes.
11. Let stand for 5 minutes before cutting.
12. Refrigerate any leftovers.
Note: Cook fresh broccoli or cauliflower about 7 minutes.
